title: pentaschistis elegans
intro: Pentaschistis elegans is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass. It is native to New Zealand and has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as combat bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of Pentaschistis elegans, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
